## What does this PR do?


## Type of change

- [ ] New tool(s) added
- [ ] New book/hardware added
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tool counts updated in Header and HeroSection (if adding tools)
- [ ] All new tools have required fields (slug, name, description, category, language, platform, github, tags)
- [ ] Slugs are unique and lowercase-hyphenated
- [ ] Tested locally
